title: dichanthelium mundum
intro: Dichanthelium mundum, also known as prairies bent grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Dichanthelium mundum include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to treat conditions such as arthritis and eczema. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in conjunction with other herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
